name: Nocciole Marchisio
message: Nocciole Marchisio is an Italian company renowned for its premium hazelnut products. Located in Piedmont, a region famed for its high-quality hazelnuts, the company specializes in cultivating, processing, and marketing hazelnuts and related products. Their offerings include whole hazelnuts, hazelnut flour, and gourmet items like spreads. Nocciole Marchisio is committed to quality, sustainability, and traditional methods.
